Tighter pc3/flatline good rescue for visualization-friendly boundary diagnosis.
Conservative medium guard plus QRS-visible good rescue.
Wider N7179 rescue: stronger medium guard with broad QRS-visible good shell rescue.
Flatline-relaxed N7179 rescue for the broad QRS-visible good shell.
Slightly stricter flatline variant of the wider N7179 rescue.

pc1_gate_note: One-dimensional good/medium geometry gate: non-bad rows with pc1 below train-fit threshold are good, otherwise medium.
Fixed approximation of the shallow-tree split found in broad boundary method search.
Simple visual boundary: PC1 rescues good, but low-QRS/flatline shell remains medium.
Amplitude version of low-QRS/flatline medium keep.

feature_tree_note: Clean-node shallow tree: high PC1 is bad core, low PC1 with visible QRS prominence is good, remaining non-bad shell is medium.
N12000 train+val shallow tree: high PC1 remains bad core, a wider low-PC1/QRS-prominent band rescues good, remaining shell is medium.
N12400 train+val shallow tree: same high-PC1 bad core guard, slightly wider good rescue band, remaining shell is medium.
N12800 train+val shallow tree with medium veto: high PC1 bad, low-PC1/QRS-prominent good, then low-QRS/flatline windows return to medium.
